# Bastian Machek / Fokuspunk

> Bastian Machek (known online as Fokuspunk) is a photographer and free software developer based in southern Germany. He builds Lightroom Classic plugins and mobile health apps.

## Projects

### LrGeniusAI
AI-powered Lightroom Classic plugin for automatic photo tagging, image descriptions, and semantic natural-language search. Supports local models (Ollama, LM Studio) and cloud models (Google Gemini, Vertex AI). Uses a Python backend (geniusai-server) with Open-CLIP embeddings.
- [LrGeniusAI project page](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/LrGeniusAI/)
- [LrGeniusAI website & download](https://lrgenius.com)
- [LrGeniusAI on GitHub](https://github.com/LrGenius/LrGeniusAI)
- [LrGeniusAI help documentation](https://lrgenius.com/help/)

### LR Immich Plugin (lrc-immich-plugin)
Free, open-source Lightroom Classic plugin to upload, sync, back up, and import photos between Adobe Lightroom Classic and a self-hosted Immich server via the Immich API. Supports export presets, publish services, album sync, duplicate detection, and stacking.
- [LR Immich Plugin project page](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/lrc-immich-plugin/)
- [LR Immich Plugin on GitHub](https://github.com/bmachek/lrc-immich-plugin)
- [Download latest release](https://github.com/bmachek/lrc-immich-plugin/releases/latest/)

### CIDP Buddy
Free Flutter app for patients with Chronic Inflammatory Demyelinating Polyneuropathy (CIDP). Manages infusion and medication schedules, supply inventory, smart scheduling, and a vitals and symptom diary. Released under GPL v3.
- [CIDP Buddy project page](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/cidp-buddy/)
- [CIDP Buddy on GitHub](https://github.com/bmachek/CIDPbuddy)

## How-to guides

- [How to install the Lightroom Immich Plugin (Windows & macOS)](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/posts/install-lightroom-immich-plugin/) — Download, add in Plug-in Manager, create an API key, connect to Immich, upload photos.
- [How to back up your Lightroom Classic photos to Immich](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/posts/back-up-lightroom-photos-to-immich/) — One-shot export or living publish service for ongoing backup to a self-hosted Immich server.
- [Sync Lightroom albums to Immich with a Publish Service](https://blog.fokuspunk.de/posts/sync-lightroom-albums-to-immich/) — Keep Lightroom collections and Immich albums in sync automatically.
